description: A field team has deployed a rapid-response station. You must register it immediately. Write a Python script using the `seiscomp.datamodel` and `seiscomp.io` APIs to generate a SeisComP inventory XML file (SCML) from scratch and import it into the system database (mysql://sysop:sysop@localhost/seiscomp). The inventory must include Network 'TR', Station 'RAPID' (Lat: 37.5, Lon: 137.2, Elev: 100.0), SensorLocation '00', and Stream 'BHZ' (20.0 Hz), all with a start time of 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z. Save the generated SCML to /home/ga/rapid_station.scml.
